zh.Downpatrick, Down, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 唐堂帕特利可
zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.Lacock Priory, Wanborough, Wiltshire, En: 英國英格蘭維爾爾望別洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Stephen de Longespée於大約1216年出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里時，他的父親William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury41歲，母親Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury31歲。他於1243年2月8日與Emmeline Riddlesford在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他於1259年被列為justiciar of ireland。他去世於1260年在英國英格蘭維爾爾望別洛享年45歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾拉可可。

zh-hans.Downpatrick, Down, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 唐堂帕特利可
zh-hans.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh-hans.Lacock Priory, Wanborough, Wiltshire, En: 英国英格兰維爾爾望別洛
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Stephen de Longespée于大约1216年出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里时，他的父亲William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury41岁，母亲Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury31岁。他于1243年2月8日与Emmeline Riddlesford在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他于1259年被列为justiciar of ireland。他去世于1260年在英国英格兰維爾爾望別洛享年45岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾拉可可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Stephen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English spelling of the name of the first Christian martyr (Acts 6–7), whose feast is accordingly celebrated next after Christ's own ( 26 December ). His name is derived from the Greek word stephanos ‘garland, crown’.

variants.name: Stephan
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , preserving the vowels of the Greek name.

variants.name: Steven
meanings: Variant of   Stephen  , reflecting the normal pronunciation of the name in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Stephen de Longespée was born about 1216, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, his father, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, was 41 and his mother, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, was 31. He married Emmeline Riddlesford on 8 February 1243, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. In 1259, at the age of 44, his occupation is listed as justiciar of ireland. He died in 1260, in Wanborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Lacock, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Stephen de Longespée est né environ 1216, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Emmeline Riddlesford le 8 février 1243, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. En 1259, à l’âge de 44 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justiciar of ireland. Il est décédé en 1260, à Wanborough, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterré à Lacock, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Stephen de Longespée um 1216 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury 41 und seine Mutter Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury 31. Er hat am 8. Februar 1243 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England Emmeline Riddlesford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. 1259, als er 44 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justiciar of ireland aufgeführt. Er starb 1260 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Wanborough, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lacock, Wiltshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Longespée è nato il circa 1216 nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Emmeline Riddlesford il 8 febbraio 1243, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Nel 1259, all'età di 44 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justiciar of ireland. Morì nel 1260, nel Wanborough, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolto a Lacock, Wiltshire, England.

ja.Downpatrick, Down, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ダウンダウンプアトリック
ja.Lacock Abbey, Lacock, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアラコック
ja.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: イギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー
ja.Lacock Priory, Wanborough, Wiltshire, En: イギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアワンボロウ
ja.lifeSummary: Stephen de Longespéeが約1216年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた時，父William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisburyは41歳，母Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisburyは31歳であった。1243年2月8日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでEmmeline Riddlesfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。1259年，44歳の時，職業はjusticiar of irelandと記録されている。彼は1260年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアワンボロウで45歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアラコックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Stephen de Longespée(이)가 대략 1216년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1243년 2월 8일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Emmeline Riddlesford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1259년, 44세의 나이로 그의 직업은 justiciar of ireland이었다. 그는 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 완버루에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 라콕에 묻혔다.

mn.Lacock Priory, Wanborough, Wiltshire, En: Wanborough, Wiltūnscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Stephen de Longespée nasceu aproximadamente 1216, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Emmeline Riddlesford em 8 de fevereiro de 1243, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Em 1259, com 44 anos, sua profissão aparece como justiciar of ireland. Ele faleceu em 1260, em Wanborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos, e foi sepultado em Lacock, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Stephen de Longespée родился около 1216 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Emmeline Riddlesford 8 февраля 1243 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. В 1259 году, в возрасте 44 лет,  он работал по профессии justiciar of ireland. Он умер в 1260 г. в местности ванбороую, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и был похоронен в местности лакокк, уилцхир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Stephen de Longespée nació aproximadamente 1216, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Longespée 3rd Earl of Salisbury, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Ela FitzPatrick Countess of Salisbury, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Emmeline Riddlesford el 8 de febrero de 1243, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. En 1259, a la edad de 44 años, su ocupación registrada era justiciar of ireland. Murió en 1260, en Wanborough, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años, y fue sepultado en Lacock, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.
